title: H200 Video Parallelism Refresh
description: 2GPU Wan video profile refresh for SGLang-Diffusion, vLLM-Omni, and LightX2V after adding vLLM-Omni CFG/Ulysses profiles, a LightX2V FA3 H200 profile, and an explicit SGLang BF16 VAE run.

policy.selection: explicit 2GPU H200 profile sweep for SGLang-Diffusion BF16 VAE, vLLM-Omni TP, vLLM-Omni CFG, vLLM-Omni Ulysses/SP, and LightX2V FA3
policy.cache: no response cache, no Cache-DiT, no temporal cache
policy.hardware: 2x NVIDIA H200 devbox, not CI/runner/build/GitHub Actions infrastructure
policy.notes: SGLang-Diffusion Wan rows are newly rerun with explicit --vae-precision bf16 to align with LightX2V's BF16 Wan VAE serving path.

precision.note: The earlier SGLang-Diffusion fp32 Wan rows are the official-parity precision baseline; this report uses BF16 only for the LightX2V best-performance comparison.

reproduce.command: SINGLE_E2E_FRAMEWORKS=sglang SINGLE_E2E_CASES="wan21_t2v_1_3b_480p wan22_ti2v_5b_704p" RUN_ID=h200-video-parallelism-refresh-20260611-sglang-bf16-vae OUTPUT=/scratch/flux1_tp_shard_20260611/report/video_parallelism_refresh/h200-video-parallelism-refresh-20260611-sglang-bf16-vae.json DASHBOARD=/scratch/flux1_tp_shard_20260611/report/video_parallelism_refresh/h200-video-parallelism-refresh-20260611-sglang-bf16-vae.dashboard.md PORT=32100 DIFFUSION_BENCH_SGLANG_EXTRA_SERVE_ARGS="--vae-precision bf16" SGLANG_DIFFUSION_FRAMEWORK_VENV_ROOT=/scratch/framework-venvs SGLANG_DIFFUSION_SKIP_FRAMEWORK_INSTALL=1 HF_HOME=/cluster-storage/models/huggingface DIFFUSION_BENCH_HF_CACHE_DIR=/cluster-storage/models/huggingface/hub bash scripts/run_h200_single_e2e_20260510.sh

RUN_LIGHTX2V=0 RUN_VLLM_OMNI=1 VIDEO_REFRESH_CASES="wan21_t2v_1_3b_480p wan22_ti2v_5b_704p" RUN_ID_ROOT=h200-video-parallelism-refresh-20260611 REPORT_DIR=/scratch/flux1_tp_shard_20260611/report/video_parallelism_refresh PORT_BASE=31800 SGLANG_DIFFUSION_FRAMEWORK_VENV_ROOT=/scratch/framework-venvs SGLANG_DIFFUSION_SKIP_FRAMEWORK_INSTALL=1 HF_HOME=/cluster-storage/models/huggingface DIFFUSION_BENCH_HF_CACHE_DIR=/cluster-storage/models/huggingface/hub bash scripts/run_h200_video_parallelism_refresh_20260611.sh

RUN_VLLM_OMNI=0 RUN_LIGHTX2V=1 VIDEO_REFRESH_CASES="wan21_t2v_1_3b_480p wan22_ti2v_5b_704p" RUN_ID_ROOT=h200-video-parallelism-refresh-20260611 REPORT_DIR=/scratch/flux1_tp_shard_20260611/report/video_parallelism_refresh PORT_BASE=31900 SGLANG_DIFFUSION_FRAMEWORK_VENV_ROOT=/scratch/framework-venvs SGLANG_DIFFUSION_SKIP_FRAMEWORK_INSTALL=1 HF_HOME=/cluster-storage/models/huggingface DIFFUSION_BENCH_HF_CACHE_DIR=/cluster-storage/models/huggingface/hub bash scripts/run_h200_video_parallelism_refresh_20260611.sh
